examples: "Well, never mind now," he said gruffly.
"I'll put the key in the window."—"You needn't bother," he said gruffly.
'Sit down,' said the young man, gruffly. 'he'll be in soon.'
Defying one of the oldest political traditions, the Arizona senator is winning by gruffly refusing to tell people what they want to hear.
There were the Northern Starks, led by the gruffly ethical Ned Stark and his dignified wife, Catelyn, and their gruffly ethical and dignified children.
